raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jehkaba Dsimmunu/ un man-
na Kalpa Dahwida/ ka es ne
nemnu no winna Dsimmuna
Walditajus pahr Ahbräma/
Ihsäika/ un Jehkaba Dsimmu-
nu. Jo es atgreesifchu winna
Zeetunu / un apschehlofchohs
pahr winneem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Babeles/ un ar tawu pato
Mutti tu winnu bildinaſt/
nahtſt uhs Babeſi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "4. Bet klaust ta KUNG
Wahrdü/ ak Zedekijus tu Ke-
ninsch no Juhda! Ta fakka t-
KUNGS uhs tewi: Tu ne m
mirſt zaur Sobbinu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "5. Tu nomirſi ar Meeru. U-
pehz tahm Dedsinafchanahm t-
wo Tehwu/ to preekſchaſo Ke-
ninu/ kas tawa Preekſcha-
bjuſchi/ tapatt tee dedſinaſs
wis labbad/ un noschehlohs ten-
un fazzihſ: Ak Kungs! jo es
mu fcho Wahrdü runnajs/ fo-
ka tas KUNGS.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta XXXIV. Nodalla.
Weena bahrga Apdraudeschana/ ka Jerusalemei
buhs ar Ugguni jadedſinatai: 1/2. Un tam
Kehninam Zedekijum faguhſſitam kfuht; 4.
Un tapehz fa tee Judi ſawus fwabbadi lai,
ſlus Brohtus un Mahfas attat eekſch jaunas
Kalpoſchanas bij speeduschi: 8/ro, Bubſ
teem wiſſai poſſia eet: 17.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "1. Chis irr tas Wahrdſ/
Skas us Jeremiju notikke
no ta KUNGA/ kad
Nebukadnezars tas Kehninſch
no Babeles/ un wiſs winna Kar-
ra-Spehks/ un wiſas Semmes
Walstibas / kas appalfch tahs
Waldoſchanas winna Rohkas
bija/ un wiſſi Landis prett Je-
rusalemt / un wiſſeem winnas
Pilsfahteem karroja/ un fazzija.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "2. Ta fakka tas KUNGS/
tas Israeta Deeivs : Eij/ un
runna us Zedekiju to Kehninu no
Juhda/un fakki usto: Ta fakka
tas KUNGS: Redſ/ es dohmu
ſcho Pilsfahtu tam Kehninam no
Babeles Rohkä/ un wiſſch fa-
dedsinaſs te ar Ugguni.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "3. Un tu ne iſbehgſt no win-
na Rohkas/ bet tapſt teefcham
grabbts/ un winnam Rohkä
ohts/ un tawas Azzis redſehs
ibs Azzis ta Kehninu no
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "6. Un tas Praiveets Jerem-
ius fazzija wiſsus fchohs Wah-
dus us Zedekiju to Kehninu
Juhda/ Jerusaleme.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "7. Kad tas Karra-Spehks
Kehninu no Babeles karra-
prett Jerusalemi / un prett w-
feem zitteem Pilſtahteem
Juhda / prett Lakifu/ un pr-
Aseku/ jo ſchee ſtipri Pilſfa-
bja atliſſutchi ſtarp teem Pi-
tahteem Juhda.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "8. Schis irr tas Wahrd-
kaſ notikke us Jeremiju no
KUNGA/ pehz ka tas Kehnin-
Zedekijus weenu Derribu bij d-
rijs ar wiſſeem Landim/ kas-
rusaleme bija/ weenu Swab-
dibus-Gaddu winneem istau-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "9. Ka ifkatram fawn Kal-
un ifkatram fawn Kalponi/
weens Eebreeris jeb Eebreere-
irr/ btj fwabbadu atlaiſt/ ka-
we-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
